overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a foggy industrial district. The player character moves from beneath highway overpasses with large storage tanks, through an open plaza with a food vendor and digital billboard, and along a graffiti-covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage yard beneath highway overpass

events.description: large digital billboard becomes visible in the distance beyond the storage tanks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial underpass toward distant lights and the emerging billboard

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial tanks with red warning lights on top
massive concrete highway overpass creating a cavernous ceiling
small stall or vending machine illuminated with blue neon light
tall street lamp casting warm orange light through the fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a foggy industrial yard beneath massive highway overpasses. Large storage tanks with red warning lights dominate the background while the camera moves forward on asphalt ground. A blue-lit vending stall sits to the left as a large digital billboard becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open vendor plaza beneath large digital billboard

events.description: approaching illuminated food stall with vendor visible behind grill
close view of food vendor at stall with intense blue and red neon lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing the food vendor stall beneath the towering digital billboard

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind illuminated food grill with blue and red neon lighting

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying animated advertisement with figure
silver food truck trailer with side door and serving window
white plastic chairs and table arranged near the food truck
food preparation grill with red glowing elements and blue neon accent

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a plaza dominated by a massive digital billboard overhead. The camera approaches a food truck setup with a vendor behind a neon-lit grill. Plastic furniture sits nearby as pedestrians move through the area. The industrial tanks fade from view behind as the foggy atmosphere persists.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated sidewalk alongside industrial wall and highway

events.description: exiting open plaza into enclosed walkway alongside concrete industrial wall
passing pedestrian with prominent cybernetic head implants and goggles

agents.ego_description: transitioning to the sidewalk and passing a pedestrian with visible cybernetic head implants

notable_agents.action: bald pedestrian with glowing cybernetic goggles walking past camera

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with weathered surface running alongside the walkway
metal safety railing separating sidewalk from lower road level
series of street lamps illuminating the path forward

segments.scene_description: Leaving the plaza behind, the camera enters a narrower walkway bounded by a concrete industrial wall on the left and a metal railing overlooking traffic on the right. A pedestrian with distinctive cybernetic implants passes by in the opposite direction. The ground transitions to paved concrete as streetlights line the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered industrial walkway with Route 66 murals

events.description: passing colorful Route 66 style graffiti murals painted on the industrial wall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the graffiti-covered industrial walkway with street lamps overhead

entered.detail: circular Route 66 style signs painted in red, white, and blue on the concrete wall
sparse vegetation and weeds growing at the base of the industrial wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the enclosed walkway where the concrete wall features prominent Route 66 style graffiti murals. Sparse weeds grow at the wall's base while street lamps cast pools of light on the pavement. The cybernetic pedestrian has passed out of view, and the camera moves steadily forward through the foggy industrial night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy industrial district that transitions from a cavernous highway underpass into a narrow, graffiti-lined walkway. It begins in a misty yard beneath massive overpasses, moving past large storage tanks with red warning lights and a blue-lit vending stall toward a distant digital billboard. As the camera enters an open plaza, the industrial tanks fade into the fog and the view expands to reveal a neon-lit food truck and pedestrians gathered under the glow of the overhead billboard. The scene then shifts as the camera leaves the plaza and enters a narrower corridor bounded by a concrete wall and a metal railing, passing a cybernetic pedestrian while the ground transitions to paved concrete. Finally, the path continues along the enclosed walkway where street lamps cast pools of light over Route 66 style graffiti murals and sparse weeds growing at the wall's base.
